violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. Unlabeled jars of honey in establishment. Unable to determine if source is a registered apiary with the state of South Dakota.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Service alley countertop refrigerator has products temping at 44-46 degrees F.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Pooling liquid in drawer cooler under grill. Needs cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
